steps.title: Separate the two listed events
steps.content: The sentence after the colon gives examples of pivotal events. The first event is the founding of the American GI Forum in 1948; the second event is the Mendez v. Westminster decision. The blank needs the year and a sentence boundary before the second event.

steps.title: Reject boundary errors
steps.content: Choice B makes For one introduce the second event instead of the first. Choice C leaves the two events joined by commas, creating a run-on. Choice D omits the year 1948 entirely. The answer is A.
